query_normalized: evaluating the use of graph neural networks for anomaly detection in network traffic computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (b) as it measures the same dependent variable (anomaly/intrusion detection performance) on the same domain (network traffic), even though it uses CNNs instead of GNNs. For a literature review, this establishes relevant prior work on deep learning approaches for network intrusion detection, helping to contextualize the research gap that GNN-based methods would address.
